creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
shells/bash-completion was currently updated to a version that's maintained by
another team. This version is severely broken on amd64.

Please repocopy ports/shells/bash-completion from 2010-09-01
(pcvs co -D'2010-09-01' ports/shells/bash-completion) to
ports/shells/bash-completion-classic. I will maintain this version and
register the appropriate conflicts.
